hero.art_prompt: Neha, a 28 year old Indian woman in smart-casual, focused and confident, studying a clean business dashboard on a laptop, modern home office, analytical and aspirational.

panels.narration: Neha was already good at working with data at work.
panels.dialogue: I loved finding stories in the data.
panels.img_prompt: Neha, 28, happily exploring a data dashboard on a laptop at work, curious and analytical, modern office.

panels.narration: But the next step needed an MBA she did not have.
panels.dialogue: How do I drive real decisions?
panels.img_prompt: Neha looking thoughtful, wondering how to move from reporting to driving business decisions, laptop with a simple chart, tidy office.

panels.narration: Then she found an online MBA in Data Science & Analytics.
panels.dialogue: I can grow without quitting my job!
panels.img_prompt: Neha's face lighting up at a laptop showing an online MBA in Data Science and Analytics, warm hopeful glow.

panels.narration: Neha enrolled and began leading with confidence.
panels.img_prompt: Neha confidently starting her first business analytics lesson on a laptop, notebook ready, focused and happy, warm light.

turn.title: Why An MBA In Data Science & Analytics
points: Master the real craft: business analytics, data visualisation, predictive modelling and AI for business.
Apply real AI tools for business from your very first semester.
₹2,00,000 for the full 2-year MBA (₹50,000/semester), with 0% interest EMI or a discount on upfront payment.
A UGC-entitled, NAAC A++ online MBA employers and promotions recognise.
